Headline: #73 Armitage Temporary Reroute at Armitage/Sheffield
ShortDescription: #73 Armitage buses are temp. rerouted in both directions via Armitage, Halsted, Fullerton, Sheffield and Armitage due to construction near Armitage/Sheffield.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#73 Armitage buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Armitage, Halsted, Fullerton, Sheffield, then resume their normal route on Armitage.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Armitage/Sheffield.
